ad_01.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue gradient background with white text and images of tomatoes and onions. Two product images are shown: one of tomatoes labeled 'Indian Tomato 500g' and another of onions labeled 'Onion 1kg'. Each image has a ₹1 price tag.
ad_01.jpg.visual_style: The ad uses a clean and simple design with a blue gradient background, which conveys trust and calmness. The use of product images and clear labeling emphasizes the value proposition. The color scheme is predominantly blue, with accents of orange and white.
ad_01.jpg.target_audience: Household shoppers looking for affordable groceries

ad_02.jpg.image_description: An image of a can of Nescafe Iced Latte on a wooden table with a brown cloth underneath. The can features a picture of the drink and is placed against a blue gradient background.
ad_02.jpg.ad_copy: Nescafe Ice Latte at ₹1 just for you. Add before checkout and get your order delivered to your doorstep with Instamart. ₹1 Items on Instamart. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_02.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a predominantly blue gradient background with orange and white accents. The overall aesthetic is modern and eye-catching, with a focus on the product and the promotional price. The color scheme is vibrant and attention-grabbing.
ad_02.jpg.target_audience: Young adults looking for affordable and convenient food and beverage options

ad_03.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue background with the InstaMart logo in the top left corner. There are four product images: a basket of red onions, a basket of green peas, a basket of oranges, and two green coconuts. Each product has its price listed in rupees.
ad_03.jpg.ad_copy: Lowest Prices. Real Freshness. Onions ₹29/kg Green Peas ₹29/500 gms Kinnow Orange ₹35/550 gms Tender Coconut ₹49/Pcs All essentials, delivered to your door
ad_03.jpg.visual_style: The ad has a clean and simple aesthetic with a blue background. The color palette is predominantly blue and white, with accents of brown from the baskets and various product colors. The mood is fresh and inviting.

ad_04.jpg.image_description: The ad features a TV screen in a dark room with a person sitting on a couch. On a wooden table in the foreground are two Kwality Wall's Cornetto Double Chocolate Dessert Cones and an Amul Cassatta Ice Cream box.
ad_04.jpg.ad_copy: DRS says yes to desserts. Ice creams & sweets delivered to your doorstep with Instamart. Delivered to your doorstep. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_04.jpg.visual_style: The aesthetic is modern and clean with a dark blue background. The color palette includes orange, white, and brown, creating a warm and inviting mood.
ad_04.jpg.emotional_appeal: Convenience - The ad appeals to the viewer's desire for easy delivery of desserts.
ad_04.jpg.target_audience: Young adults and families who enjoy desserts and value convenience

ad_05.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue background with white text and product images of three summer coolers: Nescafe Cafe Style Cold Coffee Iced Frappe, Milky Mist Greek Yogurt Cup, and Epigamia Greek Yogurt - Natural. The products are displayed on white platforms.
ad_05.jpg.ad_copy: Yogurt or Frappe pick any 1 at just ₹1. Get it delivered to your doorstep with Instamart. Summer Coolers for ₹1. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_05.jpg.visual_style: The ad has a clean and modern aesthetic with a predominantly blue and white color scheme. The use of white platforms and orange accents adds a pop of color. The overall mood is refreshing and promotional.
ad_05.jpg.target_audience: Young adults looking for affordable summer coolers

ad_06.jpg.image_description: A wicker basket filled with various fruits such as bananas, apples, watermelon, grapes, and lychees, placed on a beige surface against a brown background.
ad_06.jpg.ad_copy: This is your sign to eat healthy. Get fresh fruits, delivered to your door with Instamart. Daily fresh fruits delivered. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_06.jpg.hook: This is your sign to eat healthy
ad_06.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a warm and natural aesthetic with earthy tones. The dominant colors are shades of brown, green, and yellow. The overall mood is fresh and inviting.
ad_06.jpg.target_audience: Health-conscious individuals looking for easy grocery delivery

ad_07.jpg.image_description: An advertisement featuring two types of bread on a wooden table against a blue background. The breads are in their packaging: one is a blue and red Britannia Sandwich White Bread bag and the other is an orange and white The Health Factory Zero Maida Whole Wheat Bread bag.
ad_07.jpg.ad_copy: Freshly baked breads, delivered to you!
ad_07.jpg.visual_style: The aesthetic features a predominantly blue background with warm tones from the wooden table and bread packaging. The color palette includes blue, red, orange, white, and brown, creating a cozy and inviting mood.
ad_07.jpg.emotional_appeal: Convenience - The ad emphasizes the delivery aspect of freshly baked breads, appealing to the convenience of having essentials delivered.
ad_07.jpg.target_audience: Homeowners or individuals who value fresh bread and convenient delivery services

ad_09.jpg.image_description: The ad features a blue background with a prominent orange and white InstaMart logo at the top. Below the logo, the text 'Midnight cravings? Say no more, ra.' is displayed. Three products are showcased on light blue platforms: Lay's India's Magic Masala Chips, Thums Up Soft Drink Bottle, and Coca-Cola Diet Coke Can. Each product has its price and size listed.
ad_09.jpg.ad_copy: Midnight cravings? Say no more, ra. Lay's India's Magic Masala Chips ₹39 80 g, Thums Up Soft Drink Bottle ₹35 750 ml, Coca-Cola Diet Coke Can ₹35 300 ml. Insta delivered to your doorstep
ad_09.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a bold and vibrant aesthetic with a predominantly blue background, accented with orange and white. The color palette is bright and eye-catching, creating a lively mood. The use of product images and prices adds a practical touch.
ad_09.jpg.emotional_appeal: Convenience - The ad appeals to the viewer's need for quick and easy delivery of late-night cravings, emphasizing the convenience of InstaMart's service.
ad_09.jpg.target_audience: Young adults and individuals who experience late-night cravings and are likely to use food delivery services.

ad_10.jpg.image_description: A plate of sliced raw mango and cucumber sprinkled with spices and salt, accompanied by a small bowl of spice on a blue surface.
ad_10.jpg.ad_copy: The OG summer snack needs no recipe. Just raw mango, cucumber, and Instamart at your door.  . Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_10.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a vibrant and appetizing image with a predominantly green and orange color scheme, evoking feelings of freshness and warmth. The use of natural light and a simple wooden plate adds to the rustic yet appealing aesthetic. The overall mood is casual and inviting.
ad_10.jpg.target_audience: Young adults looking for easy and quick summer snack solutions

ad_13.jpg.image_description: The image shows a close-up of a pile of yellow-orange mangoes with green leaves. One mango is highlighted with a white outline and a blue '1pc' sticker.
ad_13.jpg.ad_copy: Dil maange mango? Instamart delivers fresh, juicy mangoes straight to your doorstep. Instamart - Get anything you need delivered to your doorstep. [Button: Order Now]
ad_13.jpg.visual_style: The ad features a vibrant and appetizing visual style with a focus on the mangoes. The dominant color scheme is yellow-orange, with accents of green and blue. The overall mood is fresh and inviting.
ad_13.jpg.target_audience: Urban Indians looking for convenient grocery delivery
